summary: Comprehensive testing of OTP verification, Team Leader features, AI summary, and Phone Dialer. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Registration with OTP, Team Leader role assignment, Agent assignment, My Team dashboard, Client Profile AI summary, Global search, and Phone Dialer all working correctly.

test_credentials.test_registration: Use any email, OTP is returned in response for testing

seed_data_creation: Test users and clients created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. OTP verification uses 6 individual input fields. Team Leader role is in valid_roles list. Phone Dialer shows mock_initiated status when Twilio credentials not configured.

registration_with_otp.description: Registration returns OTP in response for testing, requires_verification=true

otp_verification.description: 6-digit OTP input with individual fields, redirects to dashboard on success

team_leader_role_assignment.description: Team Leader role available in Add User dropdown (Admin, Team Leader, Agent, Viewer)

agent_assignment_to_team_leader.description: Agents button visible on Team Leader cards, can assign agents

team_leader_dashboard.description: My Team page shows agents list with stats and View Clients button

view_agent_clients.description: View Clients button navigates to agent's clients page

global_search.description: Search by name shows matching clients in dropdown (e.g., 'John' shows 3 results)

ai_conversation_summary.description: AI Summary section with Generate button, shows summary/sentiment/suggested action

phone_dialer.description: Floating phone button opens dialer with dial pad, Quick Contacts, and Call button

mocked_apis_list: Twilio Voice calls - returns mock_initiated status when TWILIO credentials not configured

ui_screenshots.registration_page: Registration form with Full Name, Email, Phone, Password, Confirm Password fields
ui_screenshots.otp_verification: 6 individual OTP input fields with Test OTP displayed for testing
ui_screenshots.team_page: Team Management with Add User, Invite Member, Bulk Upload buttons. Role dropdown shows Admin, Team Leader, Agent, Viewer
ui_screenshots.my_team_page: My Team dashboard with 4 stat cards (Agents, Total Clients, Messages Sent, Total Deals) and agents list with View Clients button
ui_screenshots.client_profile: AI Conversation Summary section with Generate/Refresh button, shows summary, sentiment, and suggested action
ui_screenshots.global_search: Search dropdown shows CLIENTS count with matching results
ui_screenshots.phone_dialer: Dial pad (1-9, *, 0, #), Calling From dropdown, Quick Contacts list, green Call button
